title: Citrusy Gooey Caribbean Pineapple Tart
description: An adventurous Venezuelan dish featuring citrusy, gooey layers with a hint of maple syrup sweetness for an elevated dessert that's also high-protein-friendly.

ingredients.name: Peanut Butter Powder (Optional)
ingredients.amount: to taste, for added protein and texture

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a tart pan.
Combine maple syrup, egg yolks, melted butter, sugar, vanilla extract, cornstarch, flour, and cayenne pepper in a bowl. Mix until smooth.
Pour the mixture into the prepared tart pan. Place 1 cup of pineapple slices on top.
Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt to stiff peaks. Fold into the topping batter gently to combine.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set in center. Let cool before adding peanut butter powder if desired.
